aka: Inside Therapy With Matt and Emma WillisChange Your Mind, Change Your Life with Matt and Emma Willis
this_title: Change Your Mind, Change Your Life with Matt and Emma Willis
trans_title: Inside Therapy With Matt and Emma WillisChange Your Mind, Change Your Life with Matt and Emma Willis
introduction: In this series, Matt and Emma team up with some of Britain’s leading therapists to explore how they can help us navigate the challenges that modern life throws at us. As they follow a range of people across the UK experiencing therapy - many for the first time - they will uncover practical and accessible ways to improve mental health and wellbeing.
chinese_title: Change Your Mind, Change Your Life with Matt and Emma Willis
